description_long: This handbag features a structured, rectangular body with a warm brown exterior and a prominent vertical panel of intricate black and gold geometric patterning on both the front and back. The bag is equipped with two sturdy, rounded handles that extend upward, allowing for comfortable hand or shoulder carrying. The main compartment is accessed via a zipper closure that runs along the top edge, ensuring secure storage of personal items. The sides of the bag are plain brown, highlighting the contrast with the decorative central panel. The overall design is elegant and practical, suitable for urban environments such as city streets or parks. The materials appear to be a combination of synthetic leather and woven textile, providing both durability and style.
description: A structured brown handbag with a central black and gold geometric patterned panel, two rounded handles, and a top zipper closure.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brown body with a central black and gold geometric patterned panel and both handles visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the slim profile of the bag, with both handles seen from the side and no visible pattern.
description_view_2: Back view mirroring the front, with the same central patterned panel and both handles visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing the slim brown side and both handles from the side.
attribute_strap_type: Two fixed, medium-length rounded handles suitable for hand or shoulder carrying; not adjustable.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Top zipper closure running the full length of the bag's opening.
attribute_decorative_elements: None, aside from the patterned textile panel.
attribute_pattern: Central vertical panel with a black and gold geometric pattern; rest of the surface is solid brown.
